name: autocode
description: Auto-detect intent, compress instructions, save 40-65% tokens. Persistent memory across sessions. Zero dependencies.
author: I-Lang Research, Eastsoft Inc.

hooks.prompt: Session paused. Update .autocode/memory.md now. Rules: 1) Sections: ## Project, ## Decisions, ## State, ## Next. 2) Project: name, stack, key files (2 lines max). 3) Decisions: [DECISION] prefix, one line each, this session only. 4) State: what works, what's broken, compressed max 10 lines. 5) Next: immediate todos max 5 lines. 6) If file exists, MERGE — append new, keep old decisions, deduplicate. 7) Max 200 lines total. 8) Use compressed syntax. Write the file now.

Context compacting. Save everything important to .autocode/memory.md before context is lost. Merge with existing content. Sections: ## Project, ## Decisions, ## State, ## Next. Compressed syntax. Max 200 lines. Write now.
